behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all critical paths/identifiers: VulnerabilityServiceFormat at uv_audit::service, AuditArgs with service_format/service_url, AuditSettings, Cargo.toml with clap feature, API_BASE constant, value_enum/default_value='osv'/ValueHint::Url attrs.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (what must exist) without providing the actual diff or line-level replacement instructions.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for required field names/types/attributes that are explicitly mandated by the instruction, so alternative correct implementations should all satisfy them.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke cargo check/test/clippy/fmt subprocesses and compile a behavioral Rust test using the enum, beyond pure text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stub implementations would fail cargo compile checks and the structural regex checks require actual field/attribute additions.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each numbered requirement in the instruction maps to a corresponding test (enum, fields, attributes, audit fn params, settings wiring, Cargo.toml dep).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Behavioral, Structural, Repo CI/CD pass_to_pass) and have descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a CLI/code-structure change with no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths (crates/uv-audit/src/service/mod.rs, crates/uv-cli/src/lib.rs) and identifiers are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references modules/files at appropriate abstraction (service module, AuditArgs struct) without pinpointing buggy lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Cargo.toml diffs are localized single-line additions for uv-audit dependency and clap optional dep.
